title: GitHub webhook -> SQS -> EFS git sync worker
description:
## Intent
Implement event-driven Git synchronization from GitHub into EFS-backed tenant repos.

## Scope
- Verify GitHub webhook signatures
- Enqueue sync jobs to SQS
- Worker fetch/reset repo on EFS per tenant
- Detect issue/config changes and publish IoT events

## Definition of Done
- Retry and DLQ behavior works as expected.
- Per-tenant sync lock prevents overlapping sync races.
- CloudWatch alarms are configured for failures and backlog.
- End-to-end webhook-to-event flow is reproducible in test.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Starting webhook+queue+sync-worker implementation.
Evidence: task moved open -> in_progress.
Next: add SQS+DLQ, webhook ingress lambda, EFS sync worker lambda, and IoT publish path scaffolding in CDK.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented event-driven sync scaffolding in the CDK foundation stack.
Evidence: added GitHub webhook ingress lambda, SQS+DLQ, EFS-mounted sync worker lambda, IoT publish permission/path, and DLQ alarm wiring; synth passes.
Next: harden secret management and tenant header validation policy; add worker-level retry/error telemetry details.
Risk/Blocker: deploy validation still blocked by local Docker daemon.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Hardened webhook secret handling and added handler-level automated tests.
Evidence: stack now provisions Secrets Manager secret for webhook ingress; webhook and sync worker tests added; `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v` now passes 5 tests.
Next: perform deploy-backed E2E validation for webhook->queue->worker path once Docker daemon is available.
Risk/Blocker: E2E closure remains gated by deploy blocker in 5.1.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Deploy-backed worker smoke test executed and revealed runtime packaging gap.
Evidence: SQS test message invoked TenantSyncWorker, but Lambda failed with  in sync_worker.py.
Next: package git in worker runtime (container image or layer) and rerun webhook/SQS->EFS sync E2E validation.
Risk/Blocker: BLOCKED until git binary is available inside TenantSyncWorker runtime.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Error detail correction for blocker milestone.
Evidence: TenantSyncWorker CloudWatch logs show FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: git during sync_worker._sync_repo subprocess call.
Next: add git to worker runtime image/layer and rerun queue/webhook smoke test.
Risk/Blocker: task remains blocked until runtime includes git binary.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Implemented git-enabled container runtime for TenantSyncWorker and redeployed worker image.
Evidence: New worker logs no longer show git-not-found; current failure is git safe.directory ownership protection on /mnt/data/anthus/kanbus/repo.
Next: deploy pending safe-directory patch in sync_worker.py and rerun SQS smoke until repo sync + IoT publish succeed.
Risk/Blocker: stack currently stuck in UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS, delaying deployment of latest patch.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Worker sync path now executes successfully after direct runtime hot-patch while stack updates are stalled.
Evidence: Latest TenantSyncWorker logs show git fetch/reset and checkout to 721fb9f without sync exceptions; prior git-missing and safe.directory errors resolved.
Next: restore IaC control by clearing CloudFormation UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS and redeploy via CDK; then run signed webhook test path.
Risk/Blocker: stack remains stuck in UPDATE_COMPLETE_CLEANUP_IN_PROGRESS, and manual Lambda image update introduces temporary stack drift.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: CloudFormation stall is cleared and IaC deploy path is healthy again; worker drift reconciled via successful CDK redeploy.
Evidence: KanbusCloudFoundation update completed at 2026-03-07 02:48 ET; direct lambda invoke returned {"status":"ok"}; queue smoke message processed with queue returning to 0 visible/0 in-flight and no new DLQ increment.
Next: execute signed webhook ingress path (requires webhook secret access) and verify emitted IoT event consumption path.
Risk/Blocker: webhook secret read is currently restricted from this IAM principal.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Worker+API path is now deploy-validated end-to-end through queue sync and authenticated API data reads.
Evidence: stack UPDATE_COMPLETE at 2026-03-07 03:13 ET; /anthus/kanbus/api/config=200 and /issues=200 after redeploy; worker logs show successful fetch/reset runs.
Next: run signed webhook ingress validation to close task.
Risk/Blocker: blocked on secretsmanager:GetSecretValue/PutSecretValue access for arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-east-1:335163751677:secret:kanbus/github-webhook/dev-DFdNbj.
